law: button label contrast >= WCAG AA on the actual glass surface
refute_by: a rendered-CSS contrast measurement over the rendered button measures below the claimed WCAG threshold
rendered_css: .btn-liquid-glass-prominent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 999px; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 20px; background: #7dcfff; color: #0c0e18; font: 600 17px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: all 320ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%); backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(160%); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); }
